name: Carpet of Flying
overview: A magical carpet that hovers and flies according to your directions.

properties.activation: You can make this carpet hover and fly by taking a Magic action and using the carpet's command word
properties.control: It moves according to your directions if you are within 30 feet of it
properties.weight_capacity_normal: Can carry up to the weight shown for its size
properties.weight_capacity_maximum: Can carry up to twice the normal weight, but Fly Speed is halved if it carries more than normal capacity

size_determination: The DM chooses the size of a given carpet or determines it randomly by rolling 1d100
